user.title: Inovelli Scene Pairing
user.description: Pair Inovelli Blue switches into ZHA groups from their scene buttons. Requires the ZHA integration.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only a single configuration of Inovelli Scene Pairing is allowed.

data_description.window_seconds: How long a switch stays in pairing mode after you hold its config button.
data_description.palette: Hues cycled by a single tap while pairing. Orange (21) is reserved for ungrouped switches.
data_description.pair_prefix: Zigbee groups created by pairing are named like "Inovelli Link 1".
